## XBus.emit() method

Emits an event with the `void` type associated as payload.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
emit(event: PropsWithType<XEventsTypes, void>): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | [PropsWithType](./x-components.propswithtype.md)<!-- -->&lt;[XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->, void&gt; | The event name. |

void
